goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be in the 'expensive' price range and should be 'in the same area as the attraction'.
Make sure you get 'food type' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the expensive price range and should be in the same area as the attraction
Make sure you get food type and postcode
